continuing.headline: ICPAC monitoring: Drought Conditions — data current to 2026 April Dekad 1 (1–10)
continuing.detail: Datasets: Current Drought Conditions (10-day CDI), 10-Day Drought Recovery Classes, Monthly Combined Drought Indicator, Monthly Drought Recovery Classes. Severity scale: Watch: Rainfall Deficit → Warning: Soil Moisture Deficit → Alert: Vegetation stress following rainfall/ soil moisture deficit

continuing.headline: ICPAC monitoring: Rainfall & Flood Risk — data current to 2026 March
continuing.detail: Datasets: Monthly Precipitation (CHIRPS), Monthly Probabilistic Precipitation Forecast, Seasonal Probabilistic Precipitation Forecast

continuing.headline: ICPAC monitoring: Soil Moisture & Vegetation Stress — data current to 2026 April Dekad 1 (1–10)
continuing.detail: Datasets: 10-Day Soil Moisture Anomaly, Monthly Soil Moisture Anomaly, Seasonal Soil Moisture Anomaly, 10-Day Vegetation Condition. Severity scale: -1.5 - -1 (Moderately dry) → 1 - 1.5 (Moderately wet)

continuing.headline: ICPAC monitoring: Temperature & Heat Stress — data current to 2026 April Dekad 14
continuing.detail: Datasets: Heat Waves Duration, Maximum Temperature Anomaly, Maximum Temperature, Cold Waves Duration
